name: qwen3.5-0.8b-int4-cpu-vision-eval
command: cd builtin && python optimize.py --config-dir cpu_and_mobile --device cpu && python ../../../.github/scripts/run_vision_eval.py --model-path cpu_and_mobile/models --pytorch-model Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B --benchmarks textvqa --limit 100 --device cpu --perf --max-delta 0.05

name: qwen3.5-0.8b-int4-cuda-vision-eval
command: cd builtin && python optimize.py --config-dir cuda --device gpu && python ../../../.github/scripts/run_vision_eval.py --model-path cuda/models --pytorch-model Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B --benchmarks textvqa --limit 200 --device gpu --perf --max-delta 0.05
